The '''Nimbus Rider 2000''', also called a '''Hutt Floater''', was a method of transportation aimed at poorer [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], due to the fact only one Hutt could fit on it at a time.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
